data.name: Create, edit, publish and unpublish simple content pages for this app instance.
data.value: Create, edit, publish and unpublish simple content pages for this app instance.

data.name: Create and edit content pages for this app instance.
data.value: Create and edit content pages for this app instance.

data.name: Use Markdown for simple pages. Rendered output is sanitized before it is shown to users.
data.value: Use Markdown for simple pages. Rendered output is sanitized before it is shown to users.

data.name: Trusted editors can use Markdown or raw HTML. HTML is rendered without sanitization.
data.value: Trusted editors can use Markdown or raw HTML. HTML is rendered without sanitization.

data.name: Choose a content type first. Markdown, HTML, and server reports each use a dedicated editor.
data.value: Choose a content type first. Markdown, HTML, and server reports each use a dedicated editor.

data.name: Write Markdown content. Server report shortcodes such as DB_JSON are supported.
data.value: Write Markdown content. Server report shortcodes such as [DB_JSON="module-status"] are supported.

data.name: Write trusted HTML directly. Server report shortcodes such as DB_JSON are supported.
data.value: Write trusted HTML directly. Server report shortcodes such as [DB_JSON="module-status"] are supported.

data.name: Changing content type changes the editor but does not convert existing content.
data.value: Changing content type changes the editor but does not convert existing content.

data.name: Leave empty for the root page. Slugs are normalized when saved.
data.value: Leave empty for the root page. Slugs are normalized when saved.

data.name: A content page with the same slug already exists for this app instance.
data.value: A content page with the same slug already exists for this app instance.

data.name: This page is not published and is only visible to managers.
data.value: This page is not published and is only visible to managers.

data.name: This page is disabled and is only visible in content administration.
data.value: This page is disabled and is only visible in content administration.

data.name: The requested content page is not published or does not exist.
data.value: The requested content page is not published or does not exist.

data.name: The requested content page is disabled, missing, or not available for your active role.
data.value: The requested content page is disabled, missing, or not available for your active role.

data.name: Browse content pages available for your active role.
data.value: Browse content pages available for your active role.

data.name: No readable content pages were found.
data.value: No readable content pages were found.

data.name: Roles with read access can view the page. Roles with write access can edit it.
data.value: Roles with read access can view the page. Roles with write access can edit it.

data.name: Server reports are JSON files in the server report directory. SQL is not edited here.
data.value: Server reports are JSON files in the server report directory. SQL is not edited here.

data.name: Server report key may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
data.value: Server report key may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

data.name: Server report definition was not found.
data.value: Server report definition was not found.
